narrative:
Perry 9 (precinct in Stark County) has 944 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
